subcodes.first_line: The heaven of human destiny is illumined by the Sun of truthfulness. O people of Bahá, the All-Knowing, the All-Powerful hath fashioned the world as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آسمان قدر انسانی به نیر راستی منور است ای اهل بها دانای توانا گیتی را بمثابه
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the power of words; of speech, @unity; oneness of humanity, @bringing forth results; fruit, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
